General.Name: Yuxing InfoTech Investment Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Yuxing InfoTech Investment Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, primarily engages in the manufacture, distribution, and sale of information home appliances and complementary products to consumer markets. It operates through Information Home Appliances (IHA), Internet Data Centre (IDC), Investing, Leasing, and Other segments. The company designs and manufactures networked audio and video products, such as digital set-top boxes (STB), hybrid dual-STBs, over-the-top/Internet Protocol Television STBs, STB equipment with Android systems, etc. It also engages in the development, construction, operation, mergers, acquisition, holding, and leasing out of properties that are used as IDC. In addition, the company trades in securities; and invests in financial instruments, including unlisted equity securities and digital assets. Further, it is involved in the provision of investment consultancy and trustee services; distribution and trade of electronic components, miscellaneous goods, and information home appliances; provision of distribution storage services; provision of administrative service; and technology development and software designing activities; and property holding. The company operates in Australia, the United States, Hong Kong, the People's Republic of China, and internationally. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.

3.Name: Mr. Jiang  Zhu
3.Title: Executive President of Risk Control Department & Executive Director
